readings.Aries: The wound you keep reopening has something to teach. You've been treating the symptom. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Taurus: There is something you've been meaning to create that you keep postponing. Today is not different, but you could make it be. What worked before will not work the same way this time.
readings.Gemini: You can do two things at once. This particular thing requires one. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Cancer: There is love in your life that is waiting to be acknowledged. Notice it. Say the thing you've been rehearsing.
readings.Leo: Your presence changes the temperature of a room. Today, use that deliberately. Something is about to become obvious.
readings.Virgo: Your care for the people around you is expressed in actions, not words. Make sure they know it. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.
readings.Libra: The version of events you're working to make fair was never quite fair to you. Sleep on it before committing.
readings.Scorpio: You do not give second chances easily. In this case, one more data point might be warranted. The first instinct was right.
readings.Sagittarius: The map is useful. The territory is better. Go off-map today. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Capricorn: Something you've been deferring — pleasure, connection, play — has been deferred long enough. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Aquarius: Your ability to see the long arc is a gift. Today requires seeing the next five minutes. What worked before will not work the same way this time.
readings.Pisces: There is beauty in what's in front of you that you've been too inside it to see. Step back. Something is about to become obvious.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: The air feeds the fire, the fire warms the air. You both tend to enjoy this too much to notice when it tips.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You accelerate each other. The direction you're heading is worth establishing before you reach full speed.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
